title: Aurora, 60616, Baby Gigi Giraffe Rattle, Soft Toy, Brown
features: Aurora’s gorgeous Baby Gigi Giraffe Rattle Plush Soft Toy
Designed especially for babies with embroidered eyes and using super soft plush materials
Gigi is printed with a netural giraffe coloured pattern and features rattle.
A beautiful baby Giraffe soft toy animal which will make the perfect gift for newborns, baby showers and Christenings.
description: Product Description Aurora’s Gigi baby Giraffe Collection features a wonderful range of giraffe designs for babies. This is a gorgeous Giraffe Rattle plush soft toy. Made from super soft and cuddly giraffe patterned lamboa material, Gigi has embroidered eyes and accents for complete softness. This giraffe has a cuddly body with long dangly legs, features a rattle. This is a perfect gift for a nursery, baby shower, birthday, christening or gifting for new parents. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products. Safety Warning Remove handtags before giving to a child. Hand wash only Box Contains Plush Toy See more
